$comment: Purpose: reference-only contract for the mullu-forge-runtime-v0.1.0-dev3 signed H_lineage receipt attestation. Governance scope: [OCE, RAG, CDCV, CQTE, UWMA, SRCA, PRS]. Invariants: receipt hash, service identity, trust epoch, signature, and attestation hash are explicit.
title: ForgeLineageReceiptAttestation
description: Signed H_lineage receipt attestation shape required before a Forge service-separated persistence commit can proceed.
